media.title: Labaron Philon impresses again in Sixers' Summer League matchup vs. Pacers - PHLY Sports
media.description: Labaron Philon had another excellent outing, leading the Sixers along with Johni Broome in a Summer League matchup against the Pacers.

items.title: Final: Sixers 100, Pacers 93 in OT. Philon with 24 points. Broome with 23 and 11. Summer Sixers are 2-0.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Final: Sixers 100, Pacers 93 in OT. Philon with 24 points. Broome with 23 and 11. Summer Sixers are 2-0.

items.title: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.

items.title: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.

items.title: Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately. 

"I think he’s going this direction [up] quickly. And I think he’s got some confidence to him that I don’t think he’ll be afraid. I think he’ll make the most of the opportunity."

items.title: Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:

“He might be the steal in the draft, I’m not gonna lie. Too many teams let him slip. For him to fall here? He is incredible. How quick he is. How tight his handle is. How he’s able to shoot the ball. Down the lane. His passing instincts…”

items.title: When TJ DiLeo first gathered the Summer Sixers, he showed clips of each player’s strengths. He called Labaron Philon a “big shot-taker, big shot-maker”

When TJ DiLeo first gathered the Summer Sixers, he showed clips of each player’s strengths. He called Labaron Philon a “big shot-taker, big shot-maker”

That’s why he told everybody to get out of the way when Philon had the ball at the top in Thursday’s final minute

items.title: Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon has mentioned adaptability as a trait he takes pride in multiple times since being drafted by the Sixers. Feels useful while joining the Maxey/Edgecombe backcourt. 

"Being able to keeping playing that way and not changing now, I feel like is really important."

items.title: Philon, on fitting into the Sixers' defensive scheme: "Get steals and being able to pressure the ball at the point of attack. To be a guard in the NBA, you have to be able to play both sides...You have to be locked in, especially at the next level."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Philon, on fitting into the Sixers' defensive scheme: "Get steals and being able to pressure the ball at the point of attack. To be a guard in the NBA, you have to be able to play both sides...You have to be locked in, especially at the next level."

items.title: Labaron Philon, on returning for his sophomore season: "It was very important for me to go back, work on the shooting, and being able to play both on and off ball...That's one of my biggest traits, being able to adapt and do both."
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon, on returning for his sophomore season: "It was very important for me to go back, work on the shooting, and being able to play both on and off ball...That's one of my biggest traits, being able to adapt and do both."

items.title: Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.

items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.

It was all worth the wait.

“Being able to hear your name is everything.”

media.title: Inside Labaron Philon Jr.’s draft night and unexpected fall to the ‘perfect spot’ with the Sixers
